title: Pat Parelli - Keeping it Natural with Cavallos
h1: Pat Parelli - Keeping it Natural with Cavallos
text: Pat Parelli - Keeping it Natural with Cavallos Pat Parelli is an expert on horse supplies and horse equipment. Watch the video below to see how he uses Cavallo Horse Boots for horses without metal horse shoes! Pat uses communication, understanding, and psychology to solve problems and bring out the best in your horse. Natural Horsemanship helps you reach your goals with your horse through love, language and leadership. Pat's Praise for There are no Horseshoes in Heaven “This lovely book is a must read. It’s all about never ending improvement – not only for the sake of our four-legged partners, but for ourselves!” — Pat Parelli Pat tells you why Cavallos changed his mind about hoof boots in this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T3c3FDbmKic

title: Our Saddle Pad Technology
text: Our Saddle Pad Technology Cavallo Total comfort System Saddle Pads are, quite simply, “the best saddle pads in the world.” Our Tri-Density Solution combines the shock-absorbing power of three cutting-edge materials to provide both you and your horse with a superior ride each and every time you hit the trail. Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pads use the most technologically advanced materials to create “The best saddle pads in the world.” See more of What Monty Roberts has to say about Cavallo saddle pads here. The secret is the The Cavallo Tri-Density Solution PLUS Performance Enhancement: Saddle Pad Technology & Features Technologically advanced materials allow the pad to provide more shock absorption than pads twice as thick. The thinner pad creates more room for articulation of the horse’s scapula during riding. Check out our full line of Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pads. SHOP SADDLE PADS Horse Benefits Improves saddle fit by contracting at pressure points and filling up gaps. Redistributes weight off the spine and onto the muscle, enhancing important saddle gullet function Provides wither relief with unique cutback feature Closed-cell compression allows shoulder blades to move more freely Lightweight, Aerated design keeps your horse cooler Construction Features Cavallo’s Tri-Density Solution layered-foam construction is highly shock absorbent Durable, high-quali

title: Your Cavallo Warranty & Shipping Information
text: Warranty & Shipping Information The Cavallo Best Boot Guarantee Cavallo's Best Boot 180-Day Warranty Details: Did you know the Cavallo ‘Best Boot Warranty’ is the longest hoof boot warranty on the market by far? The Cavallo warranty is double or even triple the length of any other hoof boot brand. Cavallo guarantees the quality and workmanship of Cavallo Hoof Boots for 180 DAYS (that’s a full 6 months) from the date of purchase. Any claims must be directed to the original place of purchase. When warranted the boots will be repaired or replaced. The guarantee does not cover natural wear-and-tear, inappropriate use, modifications, changes or alterations, unattended horses, incorrect sizing, excessive heat exposure, exposure to sharp objects, or use with metal shoes without Cavallo High Tenacity Protection Pads in place. To be fully protected by the Cavallo Best Boot 180-Day Warranty, Cavallo Hoof Boots must be purchased from a recognized Cavallo retailer. Cavallo Hoof Boots purchased as “used” or “second-hand” are not covered under the Cavallo Best Boot 180-Day Warranty. The use of hoof boot pads, wraps and other Cavallo hoof boot accessories is optional. While all Cavallo materials are of excellent quality and our manufacturing processes meet the highest standards, we cannot control the variables related to care and usage. Therefore, accessories are not covered under our warrant

title: Exchanges & Returns
text: Arranging an Exchange or Return IMPORTANT - Please review this page carefully before making a size exchange or a return: All returns/exchanges may be arranged with your original place of purchase only. ALL exchanges/returns and warranty issues with us at Cavallo Horse & Rider ( www.cavallo.local) must first be PRE-AUTHORIZED , and a return authorization number must be obtained. NOTE - When purchased directly from Cavallo in Canada or the USA, your return will be handled within North America. Boots can be returned to either our Canadian or U.S. facility - no international return shipping required. This helps keep the return process faster, easier, and more affordable for our customers. Your Exchange/Return Checklist: The following must be provided to obtain a Return Authorization Number: IMPORTANT: BEFORE THE EXCHANGE IS APPROVED, photos of boots and packaging must be sent through the form below to confirm they will be returned in AS-NEW condition. Your original order number. The quantity, style, colour, size and sole width of the boots you will be exchanging or returning (or relevant product info, if not boots). The reason for exchange or return (i.e. boots too large, too small, etc.) The new size(s) you require (OR, if you are unsure, request assistance from our sizing team). Please ship products back in an outer box or wrapping so the original packaging is protected and ready

title: Thank You
text: Thank you for your submission and welcome to the Cavallo community! Cavallo is home to the most popular hoof boots in the world. Look for Cavallo Barefoot Trim Manual coming to your inbox soon! Here at Cavallo you will find the most economical alternative to metal horse shoes, technologically advanced saddle pads, and valuable information for equine health. Cavallo horse boots are easy to size, easy to fit and easy to care for – the simplest, safest, most comfortable hoof boot in the world. Happy Trails!

title: The Research Behind Cavallo Boots
text: Cavallo Hoof Boots are the Best in the World. But if you're New to Booting, you Might ask WHY? Here's the PROOF of why they are the best: Western Kentucky University Research Recommends Cavallo Trek Hoof Boots for Hoof Protection, Traction & Reduced Pressure Dr. Jennifer Gill and Gabriella Lynn of the Western Kentucky University Equine Science Department (WKU) completed the first independent university study comparing hoof boots to traditional metal shoes. They chose their preferred boots, Cavallo Trek Boots, for this study. Results confirmed what those in the horse community have been witnessing since 2006. Cavallo Trek Hoof Boots benefit horses – by providing comfort, protection, shock absorption and minimizing potential hoof damage. Jennifer Gill Discusses the Results of the WKU Hoof Boot Study: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wY7DYZTNSPs The study focused on surface area, force, and pressure exerted on horse’s hooves while traveling on the hard surface of asphalt. Scientists used FujiFilm imaging to determine the amount of pressure felt in the horse’s hooves. This film procedure allowed the scientists to see dynamic pressure through color mapping. “The Cavallo Hoof Boots protected the entire hoof itself, which we thought was very beneficial, especially over some other types of hoof protection, such as horseshoes,” Gill said. “We also found that the tread of the Cavallo Trek

title: There are No Horseshoes in Heaven
h1: There are No Horseshoes in Heaven
text: There are No Horseshoes in Heaven By Carole Herder Escape the Limits of Tradition and Harness the Power to Effectively Manage Your Horse’s Well-Being … Naturally. What would it be like to know what you need to keep your horse healthy and sound? What can you do every day to make the most of your experience with your horse? There Are No Horseshoes in Heaven offers a profound and passionate exploration of past patterns, guiding you through an entertaining and thought-provoking invitation to make alternative choices. Protect your horse from pain and discomfort, maximize your riding experience and gain insight into the ‘hot spots’ for horses, through scientific evidence and real-life stories. There Are No Horseshoes in Heaven exposes the passé ways of thinking that have impacted our horses. This book examines horses’ natural way of being and shows how small changes in our husbandry can yield big results. It calls us to apply the philosophy of empowerment with a healthy dose of curiosity and move forward into interesting new times. Wishing you many happy trails, Praise for There are no Horseshoes in Heaven: “A beautifully-written true story of a kindred spirit’s journey through life, discovering ways to leave the world a better place for horses and people, too.” — Monty Roberts “Carole and I share a deeply rooted passion for horses and their welfare.
